subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath attained unto the hearing and turned towards God, the Lord of the worlds, having traversed land and sea [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن فاز بالاذن و اقبل الی الله رب العالمین قطع البر و البحر و
